name: Number C73: Abyss Supra Splash
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>７３ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>激</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>瀧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>瀑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アビス・スープラ
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Nanajūsan Gekirōbakushin Abisu Sūpura
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 73: Abyss Supra, the God of Roaring Cascades
desc:
3 Level 6 monsters
If a monster you control battles an opponent's monster, during damage calculation (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card once per battle; your battling monster gains ATK equal to the ATK of the opponent's monster it is battling, during that damage calculation only. If this card has "Number 73: Abyss Splash" as material, it gains this effect.
● This card cannot be destroyed by card effects.
